examples: Cooper and her colleagues argue that a "town of culture" award could consolidate the town city ties in Britain.
The new release will be a LTS release, so it will likely be more conservative than other releases and consolidate on the many changes over the past year.
Changes in the competitive dynamics of this fragmented industry are at last making it feasible for wholesalers to consolidate.
Millions spent on advertising and to consolidate production didn't bring new drinkers, just reshuffled the deck.
Alloy will consolidate to two offices, one in Los Angeles and one in New York.
